title: Ehab and the Expected XOR Problem

content.problemStatement: Write a program for the coding challenge "Ehab and the Expected XOR Problem". Refer to LeetCode description: https://codeforces.com/contest/1174/problem/D
content.inputFormat: The first line contains an integer n, the number of elements in the array. The second line contains n space-separated integers.
content.outputFormat: The expected value of the XOR of all prefixes of the array.

solution.approach: Calculate the probability of each bit being 1 in the XOR of all prefixes and use it to find the expected value.

code.Python3:
n = int(input())
a = list(map(int, input().split()))
ans = 0
for i in range(n):
    x = 0
    for j in range(i + 1):
        x ^= a[j]
    ans += x
print(ans)
